# Code Anchors: Story as Unit

- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — sizes each story, rolls epic complexity up from the stories, and stops decomposing at the story.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-gh-create-story/` — files one GitHub issue per user story, linked under the epic.
